title: Entity Boss Bar
description: This is a simple mod for the Fabric Loader, that renders a simplistic bar made of pipe symbols (|), that represents the health of the Entity you are looking at.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Entity Boss Bar** is a client-sided mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that renders a bar (made up of the "|" symbol [pipe]), that represents the **health of the entity that you are looking at**, every time you do. On top of the bar, there is also some text, that shows the entity's **health** & **max health** as numbers (the text also shows the **Entity's name**). Upon depletion, the bar drains smoothly, acting like a Minecraft vanilla boss bar. 

For a visual of this mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or view this mod's screenshots in the **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-boss-bar/gallery)**.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**
